About the Event

You & Your Spouse Are Exclusively Invited

You and your spouse are exclusively invited to Travel Smart 2026 — a private, invitation-only virtual event revealing the insider secrets our members use to enjoy luxury cruises and condo stays at up to 70% less than the public pays. Your spot is personally reserved.

This is a 60–90 minute private virtual insider session — no obligation, no timeshare, no pressure. Simply attend and walk away with your complimentary Alaska Cruise for Two.

Your Exclusive Super Attendee Bonus

Qualified couples who attend our full 60–90 Minute Cruise & Travel Showcase receive a complimentary 5-Star Vidanta Resort Stay — up to four guests included. Vidanta is Mexico's most celebrated luxury resort destination, with world-class pools, private beaches, and five-star dining.

This bonus is reserved exclusively for attendees who complete the full showcase session.
